posts.text:
“DOJ subpoenas ex-FBI Director James Comey.”

@mrddmia says this moment has been a long time coming.

“This is about alleged weaponization of law enforcement — and if proven, it would be the greatest scandal.”

Video

“They’re puppets for Iranian PROPAGANDA.”

@AsraNomani warns these groups are echoing Tehran’s messaging inside the U.S.

“They repeat talking points about America as the ‘belly of the beast’ and push narratives meant to undermine us from within.”

Video

“We don’t have a partner for PEACE in Iran.”

Nazee Moinian says those in power are committed to preserving the regime.

“They don’t share Western values — and any agreement they sign isn’t worth anything.”

Video

“There may be NO good airstrike option.”

Andrea Stricker says the Pickaxe Mountain nuclear facility may be too deep to destroy from the air.

“That could force a special forces operation — going inside the complex to eliminate it once the regime is further degraded.”

Video

“The WARTHOG is a flying tank.”

Tom Sauer explains why the A-10 is so effective on the battlefield.

“It’s built for close precision strikes — it can loiter, take massive hits, and still deliver devastating firepower.”

Video

How many times have the Never Trumpers predicted this?


Freddy Gray (@Freddygray31)

We’ve just put our latest issue to bed. 

Christopher Caldwell has written the cover. He argues that the Iran war will likely mark the end of Trumpism:





— https://nitter.net/Freddygray31/status/2034330906932982210#m

“Joe Kent under FBI INVESTIGATION.”

@RepBrandonGill says the process must play out — but accountability is key.

“If he was leaking classified information, he ought to be held accountable, just like anybody else would be.”

Video

“Our objective is to NEUTER the regime, to render them impotent.”

@StephenM says the mission is to strip Iran of its ability to threaten the world.

“Day by day, the regime is being rendered impotent — they will not be allowed to hold us hostage with energy, missile, or nuclear blackmail.”

Video

“This is a phased operation — OBJECTIVE by objective.”

@StephenM says the campaign is unfolding exactly as planned.

“The president is achieving his goals step by step, while laying waste to Iran’s ability to threaten commerce in the Strait of Hormuz.”

Video

“Trump’s mission is clear: eliminate the IRAN threat.”

@StephenM says the focus is on dismantling Tehran’s military capabilities.

“We’ve taken out their navy, missile launchers, and defense production — all to prevent this regime from threatening and killing Americans.”

Video

“Wax figures can go VERY wrong.”

@RaymondArroyo and Laura trade hilarious jabs over some truly questionable celebrity statues.😀

“Pee-wee I could live with… this one? I don’t see the likeness.”

Video

“Spring Break ‘takeovers’ are OUT OF CONTROL.”

Sheriff Michael Chitwood warns law enforcement is being overwhelmed.

“We were outgunned. We confiscated firearms — and there could have been another 100 guns down there.”

Video

“Where’s THAT Chuck Schumer?”

@SenEricSchmitt says today’s Democrats have abandoned common sense on voter ID.

“They’ve caved to a radical agenda that doesn’t even require proving your identity — this is not the party of Truman or Clinton anymore.”

Video

Free rider syndrome — plain and simple.

They’re happy to let America do the heavy lifting, but when it’s time to stand with us? Silence.

We saw this in the 80s with Reagan — panic, protests, second-guessing. Now it’s happening again with Trump.

Peace doesn’t come from weakness. It comes from strength.

Video
This University of Alabama student went missing in Barcelona.  Please spread the word—his family is asking for help.  abc3340.com/news/local/missi…
Laura: Democrats Won’t Admit Trump Made America Safer
Rep. Chip Roy: “Iran’s radical theocracy has held the world HOSTAGE.”
Mike Sarraille: “Iran is using the Strait of Hormuz as a pressure LEVER.”
Gordon Chang: “Iran’s nuclear program exists because of CHINA.”
Sen. Eric Schmitt: “Democrats care more about DEFUNDING ICE than securing the border.”
Kevin Donegan: “Iran’s pressure tactics are acts of TERRORISM.”
Gordon Chang: “President Trump should not go to BEIJING.”
Dan Bongino: “Lone actors worry me more than sleeper cells.”
Stefano Ritondale: “A CONVICTED ISIS sympathizer was still free.”
Morgan Wright: “The laws SHOULD change for convicted terrorists.”
